svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 21px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SPI 时钟域 (SPI Clock Domain)
spi_sclk ≤ 50MHz

div.div:
AXI 时钟域 (AXI Clock Domain)
axi_aclk 50~200MHz

div.div:
CDC Async FIFO
(跨时钟域异步FIFO)
cmd_fifo / wdata_fifo / rdata_fifo

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(220, 38, 38), rgb(255, 138, 138)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(220, 38, 38), rgb(255, 138, 138));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 236px; margin-left: 286px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #DC2626; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#DC2626, #ff8a8a); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(220, 38, 38), rgb(255, 138, 138)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(220, 38, 38), rgb(255, 138, 138));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 78px; height: 1px; padding-top: 268px; margin-left: 453px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #DC2626;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#DC2626, #ff8a8a); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 243, 199), rgb(39, 30, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 411px; margin-left: 232px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
关键设计要点:
1. 异步FIFO使用格雷码指针同步
2. 跨时钟域路径标记为false_path
3. SPI域和AXI域有独立复位信号
4. 空/满标志使用同步器打两拍
